text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Say, Trainer, didn't you say we'd go on some
away races after the Wakagoma Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know the Kokura Kinen is our goal, but have you
already decided what other races I'll be taking
on?
choice_data_list: Do you have something in mind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature doubts her own strength. She simply
lacks confidence. Which race she enters won't
change that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her anxiety is apparent in the way she keeps
averting her gaze. I suppose it's something she
can't shake, even if she knows better. In that
case...
choice_data_list:
It'd be nice to go somewhere we can do some
sightseeing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
choice_data_list: We might as well if we're going on a trip.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
choice_data_list: Maybe Kyoto? They have good pickles there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
choice_data_list: Or how about looking at the fireflies in Hyogo?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pfff, ahahaha! Yeah, you're totally right! It is a
trip after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pickles and fireflies sound good to me. Might as
well choose races around there...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Like maybe the Kyoto Shimbun Hai in Kyoto and
the Naruo Kinen at Hanshin Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Let me know in advance if we're going for sure,
okay? I want to have time to look up sightseeing
spots and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not a bad idea for her to run in the Kyoto
Shimbun Hai and Naruo Kinen before the Kokura
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope those races can help Nice Nature gain
some confidence...
